name: Dave
vibe_notes: Ends sentences with multiple exclamation points. Types in ALL CAPS for excitement. Brags about Pokedex completion. Lists GameShark codes at the bottom of every page.

name: Becky
vibe_notes: Writes free verse. Quotes Poe slightly incorrectly. Has a shrine to 'her darkness'. Every other sentence contains an ellipsis...

name: Tyler
vibe_notes: Quotes lyrics as life philosophy. Thinks his mom doesn't understand. Lists his CD collection in tracklist order.

name: Linda
vibe_notes: Types in Comic Sans. Has strong opinions on the secondary market. Ends every paragraph with 'God bless!!'

name: Harold
vibe_notes: Signs off with his callsign. Includes timestamp in UTC on everything. Complains about 'kids on CB'.

name: Megan
vibe_notes: Draws ASCII horses. Names every pet. Has strong opinions on English vs Western saddle.

name: Carl
vibe_notes: Embeds photos of fish with his thumb barely visible. Captions are the weight. Links to his tackle shop.

name: Ashley
vibe_notes: Refers to JC by his first name only. Lists every tour date she attended. Maintains a 'JC sightings' log.

name: Marcus
vibe_notes: Writes in kayfabe. Debates WWF vs WCW. Has a 'move of the week' GIF. Uses 'JABRONI' unironically.

name: Sarah
vibe_notes: Writes 40-page strategy guides. Uses unnecessarily complex HTML tables for stat calculations. Flames anyone who calls it FF8.

name: Brian
vibe_notes: Everything is connected. Links to GeoCities of other truthers. Warns visitors that 'they' may be watching.

name: Tina
vibe_notes: Displays her W3C HTML 4.01 Strict validator badge prominently. Maintains a ring of 40+ sites. Ruthlessly polite.

name: Kyle
vibe_notes: Memorializes dead pets. Lists feeding schedules. Draws stage evolutions in 8-bit ASCII.

name: Deb
vibe_notes: Lists all her screen names and their specific purposes. Enforces chatroom rules with numbered bullet points.

name: Steve
vibe_notes: Evangelizes for a specific GeoCities neighborhood. Has strong opinions on which neighborhoods are 'dying'. Lists his sectors.

name: Jen
vibe_notes: Announces which Spice she is within the first 50 words. Ranks the members. Capitalizes GIRL POWER every time.

name: Greg
vibe_notes: Counts down to midnight. Lists supplies in tables. Disclaims he's 'not paranoid, just prepared'. Still active post-2000.

name: Amber
vibe_notes: Uses kawaii emoticons (^_^). Uploads badly-scanned cel pictures. Lists fansub trade contacts. Debates subs vs dubs.

name: Ray
vibe_notes: Writes in dense paragraphs with no breaks. Links to mail-order catalogs. Warns about specific agencies by name.

name: Nicole
vibe_notes: Defends Sega to the death. Lists every Dreamcast game she owns. Countdown to SegaNet launch. 'PlayStation 2 is overrated.'
